name: What is the actual process for getting into ChatGPT answers?
description: Start with your top customer questions, rewrite your key pages with direct answers, and add FAQ-style sections.

mainEntity.name: What is the actual process for getting into ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with your most important customer questions and build one page at a time. Open each page with a direct answer, use question-style headings, and add a short FAQ so the content is easy for AI systems to extract and reuse.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with your top customer questions, rewrite your key pages with direct answers, and add FAQ-style sections.
